conversations.content:
I will be arriving in Paris on Sunday. Can you please provide me the the name of a restaurant which serves French cuisine that open on Sunday? Recommend me the restaurant with the best rating.
Tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, and the operating hours.

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request, I need to begin by retrieving all restaurants in Paris, then identify those that serve French cuisine. After that, I will check which of those restaurants are open on Sunday and gather their ratings and reviews. Finally, I will collect the addresses of the top-rated restaurant(s) that are open on Sunday. I will start by getting all the restaurants in Paris.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean

<function_thought>

</function_thought>
